ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the page */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the page (e.g., News/Media Website) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the page (e.g., media, entertainment) */,
  "page_talking_about_count" INTEGER /* Number of people talking about the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page where the post was created */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of the post (e.g., link, video, photo) */,
  "post_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the post */,
  "post_message" TEXT /* Message or content of the post */,
  "post_caption" TEXT /* Caption of the post */,
  "post_picture" TEXT /* URL of the post picture */,
  "post_link" TEXT /* URL of the post link */,
  "post_description" TEXT /* Description of the post */,
  "post_created_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "post_updated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "post_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was created */,
  "post_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was last updated */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post is scheduled to be published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the post belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES post_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post being tracked */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the post */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the post */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments for the post */,
  "total_engagement" INTEGER /* Total engagement (sum of likes, shares, and comments) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement was recorded */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate based on the post's reach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_engagements_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., News, Opinion, Entertainment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., link, video, photo) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post the media file belongs to */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of the media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media file */,
  "media_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the media record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the media record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_media_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_message" TEXT /* Message of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post that was shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the post */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the post was shared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_shares_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the post was liked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post being analyzed */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the post */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Number of unique users who saw the post */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the post */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate (total engagement / reach) */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate (clicks / impressions) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_analytics_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post being tracked */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, edited, deleted) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., changes made) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_history_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduled_posts" (
  "scheduled_post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled post */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post that is scheduled */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post is scheduled to be published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scheduled post record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scheduled post record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheduled_post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduled_posts_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions the user has on the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)
